task: Advanced high-value task: Cfd Surrogate Validation Sample Risk Control Backlog. Scenario: a review committee needs a row-level exception analysis with no inferred or fabricated inputs for cfd surrogate validation sample. Embedded packet: Records: R1 CFD_pressure_drop_kPa=55 surrogate_drop_kPa=89 porosity_pct=2; R2 CFD_pressure_drop_kPa=64 surrogate_drop_kPa=85 porosity_pct=5; R3 CFD_pressure_drop_kPa=50 surrogate_drop_kPa=100 porosity_pct=1. Remediation options: O1 changes CFD_pressure_drop_kPa by -12% cost=83000; O2 changes surrogate_drop_kPa by -18% cost=99400; O3 changes porosity_pct by -25% cost=58600; max_budget=124800. Rules and constraints: absolute percent error>15% fails; porosity<40 may be outside support; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: create a validation checklist and fill it using the supplied records, citing the exact values behind each pass or failure. Deliver CFD_surrogate_4.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
